description: Action1 MCP server — endpoint inventory, patch visibility, and policy automation via REST API.
name: io.github.wyre-technology/action1-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Action1 tenant identifier (subdomain). Provide this or ACTION1_BASE_URL.
environmentVariables.name: ACTION1_TENANT

environmentVariables.description: Action1 base URL (e.g. https://your-instance.action1.com). Provide this or ACTION1_TENANT.
environmentVariables.name: ACTION1_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Transport mode for the server. Set to 'stdio' for local CLI use; the image defaults to 'http' for gateway hosting.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT

environmentVariables.description: Credential source: 'env' reads vars locally, 'gateway' expects header injection from the WYRE MCP Gateway.
environmentVariables.name: AUTH_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error
environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL

title: Action1
